title: elaeocarpus teysmannii
intro: Elaeocarpus teysmannii, also known as the Mountain Blue or Blue Bean, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Indonesia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, cough, and digestive issues. The leaves and fruits of Elaeocarpus teysmannii have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing various health benefits such as relieving respiratory problems, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Elaeocarpus teysmannii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for consumption, although its preparation and dosage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
